jp.title: NEWS・増田貴久、黒木華、Aぇ! group・小島健、ACEes・那須雄登、松下洸平らが参戦『真剣遊戯！THEバトルSHOW』
jp.description: 4月27日（月）、櫻井翔さんがMCを務める『真剣遊戯！THEバトルSHOW』が放送されます。各6人で構成されるアイドル俳優軍と芸人バラエティ軍が、番組オリジナルのゲームで真剣勝負を繰り広げます。櫻井翔さんが、『真剣遊戯！THEバトルSHOW』の初回収録の手応えや、番組にかける思いを語りました。 出演は、以下の通り。主宰：櫻井翔アイドル俳優軍：黒木華、小島健（Aぇ! group）、那須雄登（ACEes）、増田貴久（NEWS）、松下洸平、松田宣浩芸人バラエティ軍：岩井勇気（ハライチ）、王林、岡部大（ハナコ）、澤部佑（ハライチ）、杉谷拳士、やす子（五十音順／敬称略）両軍が挑戦する遊戯は、瞬発力と判…

jp.title: 高市・片山・小池 3人の女性トップリーダーが抱く共通の危機感 “カネの移し替え”対立に変化の兆し
jp.description: これまで、地方税財政をめぐって国と東京都は長く平行線をたどってきた。東京都は、都内で生み出された税財源が地方に再配分される現行制度について、「何に使われ、どんな効果があったのか見えにくい」と問題提起

jp.title: 津田健次郎 5年担当「Nキャス」ナレーター卒業「ちょっとさみしいですが」 最後は安住アナらと掛け合い
jp.description:

jp.title: 「他のズボンは履けなくなる」 ユニクロの“大人気パンツ”に絶賛の声 「シルエット最高」「スタイル良く見える」「気に入りすぎて4色も買ってしまった」

jp.title: 防水時計に自信アリ！ プロ仕様の“ベゼルロック機構搭載”したエドックスのフラッグシップモデルが42mmにサイズダウン

jp.title: 水月雨からアクティブスピーカー。Fosi Audioはスマホ背面に磁石で固定するDACアンプ

world.title: Ottawa Charge earns final PWHL playoff spot with 3-0 victory over Toronto Sceptres

Ottawa Charge downs Toronto Sceptres 3-0 to secure
final Professional Women's Hockey League playoff spot.

world.title: Megan Thee Stallion blasts Klay Thompson for cheating. 'Bye yall'
world.description: Megan Thee Stallion put her now ex-boyfriend Klay Thompson on full blast writing "Cheating, had me around your whole family playing house."

world.title: Police officer killed, another in critical condition in shooting at Chicago hospital
world.description: One police officer was killed in the line of duty and another was critically injured in a shooting at a Chicago hospital by a suspect who was brought in to the emergency department, officials said.

world.title: What counts as the woods? Judge axes Nova Scotia’s ban that defied ‘commonsense definitions’
world.description: The court sided with a Canadian hiker who deliberately challenged the order imposed to curb spread of wildfires

world.title: Michael Jackson Biopic Director Paid Millions After Reshoots Cut Abuse

world.title: Scientists Shocked to Discover Dinosaur Footprints in South Africa
world.description: Scientists have discovered dinosaur footprints along South Africa’s coastline, offering new evidence that dinosaurs continued to live in southern Africa

world.title: Mother and child die after 'getting into difficulty' in water at west London park
world.description: The woman and young boy were recovered from the water but died at the scene

world.title: Man dead after shooting in Toronto parking lot, police search for suspects
world.description: A 30-year-old man is dead after a shooting in Toronto’s west end late Friday night. Police are searching for three suspects who fled the scene in a vehicle.

world.title: Hundreds protest police inaction after pizzeria murder: 'This is a wake-up call'
world.description: Teen suspected of murdering Pizza Hut worker in Petah Tikva caught on camera holding a knife covered in blood shortly after the Independence Day stabbing
